message:
test(ratelimit): expand unit test coverage across all fcp-ratelimit modules

Adds comprehensive unit tests targeting edge cases and full API surface
coverage for the rate limiting subsystem:

- backoff.rs: exponential backoff (jitter bounds, presets, high-attempt
  capping), decorrelated jitter, linear, constant, and no-backoff
  strategies; RetryConfig lifecycle; RateLimitConfig presets and serde
  roundtripping; RateLimitState serialization; RateLimitError Display
- fcp.rs: ConcurrencyLimiter (zero-reject, permit lifecycle, clone
  shares semaphore), TokenCost computation (zero bytes, exact multiple,
  overflow), BackpressureThresholds, utilization_bps edge cases, async
  enforce tests at warning thresholds (~82% utilization)
- headers.rs: standard/hyphenated/ratelimit-prefix header parsing,
  retry-after edge cases, is_limited logic, provider-specific parsers
  for GitHub, Twitter, Stripe, OpenAI, and Anthropic including duration
  string parsing and reset-timestamp conversion
- token_bucket.rs: from_config construction, burst capacity, try_acquire_n
  edge cases (zero permits, exceeds capacity, exact capacity), reset
  behavior, wait_time estimation, acquire error paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
